channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19846] sanitytest_165g: 'keepalive msg received 6. Expected >= 7'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Li Xi <pkuelelixi@gmail.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/00aadc4a-3e85-4ad1-a561-145d6af0616e

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es-reviews/26831 - 4.18.0-553.94.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b_es-reviews/26831 - 4.18.0-553.94.1.el8_lustre.ddn17.x86_64

== sanity test 165g: ofd_access_log_reader --keepalive works ========================================= 03:14:43 (1769742883)
CMD: trevis-154vm41 ofd_access_log_reader --help
CMD: trevis-154vm41 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param obdfilter.lustre-OST0000.access_log_size=4096
obdfilter.lustre-OST0000.access_log_size=4096
CMD: trevis-154vm41 timeout 60 ofd_access_log_reader -keepalive=3 --batch-interval=4 --debug=
CMD: trevis-154vm41 grep -c /mnt/lustre-ost1' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-ost1 (opts on trevis-154vm41
CMD: trevis-154vm41 umount -d /mnt/lustre-ost1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-154vm41 killall -TERM ofd_access_log_reader
sanity test_165g: @@@@@@ FAIL: keepalive msg received 6. Expected >= 7
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6870:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:19004:test_165g()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7227:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7288:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7111:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:19008:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.*.1769742926.log
CMD: trevis-154vm39.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-154vm40,trevis-154vm41,trevis-154vm42,trevis-154vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1769742926.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1769742926.log
CMD: trevis-154vm39.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-154vm40,trevis-154vm41,trevis-154vm42,trevis-154vm43 find /tmp/test-framework-keys -name '*.key' -exec /usr/sbin/lgss_sk -r {} \; &> /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.ssk_keys.\$(hostname -s).1769742926.log
CMD: trevis-154vm42 lctl get_param 'nodemap..' > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.nodemaps.\$(hostname -s).1769742926.log
CMD: trevis-154vm39.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-154vm40,trevis-154vm41,trevis-154vm42,trevis-154vm43 keyctl show > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.keyring.\$(hostname -s).1769742926.log
CMD: trevis-154vm39.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-154vm40,trevis-154vm41,trevis-154vm42,trevis-154vm43 journalctl -a > /autotest/autotest-2/2026-01-30/lustre-b_es-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1_26831_76_df443349-f066-4dc7-9eb4-bcbe541ca8e8//sanity.test_165g.journal.\$(hostname -s).1769742926.log
CMD: trevis-154vm41 killall --quiet -KILL ofd_access_log_reader
pdsh@trevis-154vm39: trevis-154vm41: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 grep -c /mnt/lustre-ost1' ' /proc/mounts || true
CMD: trevis-154vm41 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-154vm41 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-ost1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey >/dev/null 2>&1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>&1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 test -b /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey
CMD: trevis-154vm41 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey
Starting ost1: -o localrecov,skpath=/tmp/test-framework-keys /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey /mnt/lustre-ost1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-ost1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov,skpath=/tmp/test-framework-keys /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey /mnt/lustre-ost1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>/dev/null
CMD: trevis-154vm41 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param seq.cli-lustre-OST0000-super.width=16384
seq.cli-lustre-OST0000-super.width=16384
CMD: trevis-154vm41 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: trevis-154vm41 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\"
trevis-154vm41: trevis-154vm41.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all
CMD: trevis-154vm41 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]

{3}

[0-9]

{4}

'
pdsh@trevis-154vm39: trevis-154vm41: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: trevis-154vm41 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-OST0000

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
